details.productUrlName: Rat in the Hat Galaxy Foil

customAttributes.description: T, Sacrifice Rat in the Hat: Until end of turn, you may cast target creature card that has a hat from your graveyard.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 10/7/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: While the gremlin, beeble, and squirrel infestations wreaked havoc on the park, Roxi was able to spin the numerous rat colonies as a "robust recycling program."
